title: Goodbye Yellow Brick Road
why_this_song: Goodbye Yellow Brick Road by Elton John (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "So goodbye yellow brick road"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "So goodbye yellow brick road"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "So goodbye yellow brick road"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When are you going to land?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "You know you can't hold me forever"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where the dogs of society howl
You can't plant me in your penthouse
I'm going back to my plough
What do you think you'll do then
I bet that'll shoot down your plane
It'll take you a couple of vodka and tonics

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yellow" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yellow" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "brick" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "brick" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When are you gonna come down?
I'm going back to my plough
Mongrels who ain't got a penny

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road" was released in 1973. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road" foi lançada em 1973. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Goodbye Yellow Brick Road" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
